_provenance: Deterministic committed input for the ACC-01 frozen-oracle golden pin. daily_pnl-branch records (order_type='daily_pnl', side=buy->+price / sell->-price). Two cases cover BOTH regimes of the pre-73 anchor-to-today formula: estimated_start>0 (control shape) and estimated_start<=0 (the LTP068 profits-withdrawn bug that fell back to account_balance). No live/untrusted data.

cases.label: estimated_start_nonpositive_ltp068_shape
cases.regime: account_balance - total_pnl <= 0 (profits withdrawn; the fallback IS the +458% LTP068 bug)
